assertion.value: F.A.W. is a full-time employee of Cellarity Inc.; the present work was carried out as an employee of Helmholtz Munich. F.J.T. reports receiving consulting fees from Roche Diagnostics GmbH and Cellarity Inc., and ownership interest in Cellarity, Inc.
